channel.title: MATH-102 Discrete Math: Counting Finite Configurations :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: MATH-102 — Discrete Math: Counting Finite Configurations 1 credit (co-designed external) Working description (External/co-designed. Counting precedes Algorithmic Complexity in B4.) To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)
